scenarioName: Validate report layout contract before rendering

boundedContext.featureGherkin:
Scenario: Validate report layout contract before rendering
    Given the report layout contract is loaded
    When layout validation runs
    Then the contract should define:
      | field |
      | schema version |
      | report title |
      | section order |
      | section ids |
      | section templates |
      | required data fields |
      | optional data fields |
      | blocker display rules |
      | promotion display rules |
    And report.md should be rendered only after layout validation passes.
acceptanceCriteria: And report.md should be rendered only after layout validation passes.
seedDataRules: seed data must be synthetic unless fixture data is explicitly allowed
seed data writes must stay inside allowed seed data paths
forbiddenActions: use secrets or personal data in seed data
mark this LLM run as QA passed
boundedContext.passFailReportingExpectations: report user-visible observations and link every pass or fail claim to evidence
